title: Blueprint Output Configuration
description: Schema for workflow output configuration. Controls logging (file output) and display (terminal output). Can be used standalone (.hiivmind/blueprint/output.yaml) or embedded in workflow.yaml initial_state.output.

outputConfig.description: Output configuration controlling terminal display and file logging

level.description: Verbosity level controlling display detail and log capture. Higher levels include all output from lower levels.

display_enabled.description: Master switch for terminal output. When false, only prompts and final result are shown.

use_icons.description: Use icons in output (checkmark, arrow, question mark, cross)

log_enabled.description: Master switch for file logging. When false, no log files are written.

log_location.description: Directory for log files (relative to skill/plugin root)

runtime_flags.description: Command-line flags that map to output configuration
